title: PumpkinHead
description: Put Pumpkin on the Head of everyone!
body:
# Pumpkin Head 🎃 *Spooookkyyyyy Sppoooookkkyyyyy* This Mods adds the Pumpkin to every mobs Head!
Don't worry about items getting deleted.
The Pumpkins 🎃 are only aesthetic and will be removed once the mod is removed.
And it works for **modded** Mobs too. ### 🎃 Happy Halloween! 🎃


### How does this work? We change the packets being send to just include the Pumpkin as Head item.
So no Helmet is gonna be deleted!
